title: Skegness Hampden Memorial
crew_summary: 4 killed including pilot Flg Off. John Raymond Bufton

external_narratives.summary: 49 Squadron Association memorial page for Hampden X3027. The aircraft was shot down by a night fighter (Lt Volker of 1/NJG2) at 00:30 on 28 October 1940 while returning from a Hamburg operation. The pilot managed to force-land in the sea within a mile of Skegness coast, but rescue services could not reach the crew in time.
key_details: Shot down by Lt Volker of 1/NJG2 (night fighter)
Ditched within one mile of Skegness coast
Rescue services unable to reach crew
Propeller blade recovered and displayed in Skegness Lifeboat Station

external_narratives.summary: Photographic record of the memorial to the crew of Hampden X3027 near Skegness. Provides visual documentation of the memorial stone.
key_details: Photographic documentation by Adrian S Pye

external_narratives.summary: Personnel record for F/O John Raymond Bufton, pilot of Hampden X3027. Provides service details within the 49 Squadron personnel index.
key_details: Individual personnel record for pilot F/O Bufton

local_contacts.role: Local authority responsible for memorial upkeep

sources: Current 53.142 -0.382 — latitude correct but longitude wrong sign (~57km west)
location_confidence.verification_notes: CORRECTION. Longitude sign error: current -0.382 places site near Bardney. Skegness coast PE25 at 53.143, +0.323 (east of meridian).
